title: Build AI Package POC with Anthropic Agent SDK
description: Create a new package at packages/ai that provides a React Router 7 web application with Tailwind CSS styling and Anthropic Agent SDK integration. This POC will demonstrate AI agent capabilities with tool use in a chat interface, following the established monorepo conventions.
why: Enable developers to interact with Claude through a dedicated AI interface that can leverage tool use capabilities, providing a foundation for intelligent assistance features within the MoneyWorks ecosystem.

tasks.title: Create packages/ai directory structure with package.json
tasks.description: Initialize the packages/ai directory with a properly configured package.json.

tasks.title: Configure Vite with Tailwind CSS v4 and React Router 7
Set up React Router 7 app structure with explicit routes.ts
tasks.description: Create app directory structure with routes.ts, root.tsx, app.css, and lib/utils.ts

tasks.title: Install and configure Anthropic Agent SDK
Create UI components for chat interface
tasks.description: Create button, input, card, scroll-area, and avatar components

tasks.title: Implement chat message display component
tasks.description: Create message-list.tsx and message.tsx with markdown support

tasks.title: Create server action for Anthropic chat with streaming
tasks.description: Implement action handler with Anthropic SDK streaming

tasks.title: Integrate chat UI with server action
tasks.description: Complete _index.tsx with Form, useNavigation, optimistic updates

tasks.title: Add root package.json script and run dependencies
tasks.description: Add 'ai' script to root package.json and run bun install

tasks.title: TypeScript verification and dev server validation
tasks.description: Run typecheck and verify dev server starts on port 5175

acceptanceCriteria.description: packages/ai directory exists with valid package.json naming @moneyworks/ai
React Router 7 configured with explicit route configuration in app/routes.ts
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: app/routes.ts uses index() with 'satisfies RouteConfig' pattern

acceptanceCriteria.description: Tailwind CSS v4 integrated with @tailwindcss/vite plugin
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: vite.config.ts imports and uses tailwindcss from @tailwindcss/vite

acceptanceCriteria.description: Anthropic Agent SDK (@anthropic-ai/sdk) installed and configured
Chat interface component renders with message input and send button
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: _index.tsx contains Input and Button components in Form with Send icon

acceptanceCriteria.description: Messages display in scrollable conversation view with user/assistant distinction
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: message-list.tsx and message.tsx implement ScrollArea with distinct styling (blue for user, gray for assistant)

acceptanceCriteria.description: Server action handles chat requests via Anthropic SDK with streaming support
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: action() in _index.tsx uses anthropic.messages.stream() with for await loop

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors (bun run typecheck)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: bun run typecheck completes without TypeScript errors (only warnings about missing web1 package)

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dev server starts successfully on unique port (bun run dev)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: bun run ai starts server on http://localhost:5175/ successfully

acceptanceCriteria.description: Environment variable ANTHROPIC_API_KEY used for authentication (documented in .env.example)
Package follows monorepo workspace conventions (workspace:* dependencies where applicable)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: package.json uses proper versioning, recognized as workspace package by bun

acceptanceCriteria.description: Root package.json updated with 'ai' script to start the dev server

decisions.description: Used native HTML elements for UI components instead of Radix UI primitives to avoid React 18/19 type conflicts
decisions.rationale: The monorepo has React 18 types at root level which conflict with React 19 types in the AI package. Native elements provide equivalent functionality without type issues.
alternatives: Use Radix UI with type overrides

learnings.description: React 18/19 type conflicts in monorepos with mixed React versions can cause Radix UI component type errors

q1.question: Why do we need an AI package?
q1.answer: To provide a dedicated interface for interacting with Claude and AI agents in the MoneyWorks context

q2.question: Why is a dedicated interface important?
q2.answer: To leverage Anthropic Agent SDK's tool use capabilities for intelligent assistance beyond simple chat

q3.question: Why do we need tool use capabilities?
q3.answer: To enable Claude to perform actions like querying MoneyWorks data, analyzing transactions, and assisting with accounting tasks

q4.question: Why is this a POC rather than full implementation?
q4.answer: To validate the architecture and integration patterns before building production features

q5.question: What is the fundamental need?
q5.answer: Enable intelligent, action-capable AI assistance within MoneyWorks to improve developer and user productivity

fiveWhysAnalysis.rootCause: Enable intelligent, action-capable AI assistance within MoneyWorks that can understand context and take actions, moving beyond passive chat to active collaboration

referenceImplementation.relevance: React Router 7 + Tailwind CSS structure, routing patterns, component organization
